1. Open the Corporate Tax De-Registration Service

Registration OverviewTaxable Person Details (!)Certificates (1)Account AccessPending Requests (0)
Registration TypeRegistration StatusTRN/WHK No.GIBANEffective Date of Registration
Corporate TaxActive10489858900001AE2673501048985890000101/04/2024
Value Added TaxNot Registered---•••

မြန်မာ

လမ်းကြောင်း: EmaraTax → Taxable Person account → Corporate Tax registration row → Actions (•••) → Deregister.

  • Corporate Tax status က Active ဖြစ်နေမှ ဒီ request ကို စတင်နိုင်တာများပါတယ်။
  • VAT de-registration နဲ့ Corporate Tax de-registration က သီးခြား service ဖြစ်ပါတယ်။ CT ကိုပယ်ဖျက်လိုက်တာနဲ့ VAT အလိုအလျောက်ပယ်ဖျက်မသွားပါ။
  • Licence cancellation နဲ့ FTA CT de-registration ကို တူတယ်လို့ မယူဆပါနဲ့။ Licensing authority action နှင့် FTA action နှစ်ခုလုံးကို သီးခြားစီဆောင်ရွက်ရနိုင်ပါတယ်။

English

Route: EmaraTax → Taxable Person account → Corporate Tax registration row → Actions (•••) → Deregister.

  • The Corporate Tax registration is normally shown as Active before starting this request.
  • VAT deregistration and Corporate Tax deregistration are separate services. Deregistering CT does not automatically cancel VAT.
  • Do not confuse licence cancellation with FTA Corporate Tax deregistration. Licensing-authority closure and FTA deregistration may require separate actions.
Control point: A dormant company or a company with zero revenue is not automatically the same as a company that has legally or factually ceased business. The selected trigger date and supporting evidence must be consistent.

2. Instructions and Guidelines

Corporate Tax De-Registration
⚙

Tutorial materials

  • Watch Video Tutorial

  • Download User Manual

Required Templates

N.A.

Required Documents

List of documents required for making an application to deregister from Corporate Tax:

  • Sale of business: documentary evidence proving the sale.
  • Merger of business: documentary evidence proving the merger.
  • Re-domiciliation: documentary evidence proving the re-domiciliation.
  • Cessation of business: documentary evidence proving the cessation.
  • Other: other relevant documents.
About the Service ⌄
Use this service to deregister from Corporate Tax and deactivate the Corporate Tax TRN.
Eligibility Criteria ›

Cessation of business, sale of business, merger, re-domiciliation/domiciliation, or another event requiring Corporate Tax deregistration.

Service Steps ›
  1. Review eligibility and supporting documents.
  2. Complete De-Registration Details.
  3. Review and declare the information.
  4. Submit and retain the reference number.
  5. Complete any final return, payment, penalty, or refund steps requested by the FTA.
FAQs ›

Does submission immediately deactivate the TRN? No. Submission starts FTA review. Final deregistration depends on approval and completion of outstanding obligations.

Portal/public service-card mismatch: The supplied portal screenshots show 15 MB limits and specific DOC/DOCX/PDF/XLS upload formats. The current public FTA service card lists different file types and a 5 MB individual limit. For the real filing, follow the upload control displayed in the live EmaraTax application and keep alternative PDF copies ready.

မြန်မာ — မစခင် ပြင်ဆင်ရမည့်အရာ

  • ပယ်ဖျက်ရတဲ့ legal/business reason ကို တိတိကျကျ သတ်မှတ်ပါ။
  • Cessation date ကို licence cancellation date လို့ မစွဲယူဘဲ business အမှန်တကယ်ရပ်တန့်သည့်အချိန်၊ dissolution/liquidation facts၊ document dates နဲ့ညှိပါ။
  • Outstanding CT returns, final return, tax, penalty, refund balance ရှိ/မရှိစစ်ပါ။
  • Authorized Signatory နှင့် declaration submit လုပ်မည့်သူ၏ authority ကိုစစ်ပါ။

English — Pre-filing preparation

  • Identify the precise legal/business reason for deregistration.
  • Do not automatically use the licence-cancellation date. Reconcile the cessation date with actual business cessation, dissolution/liquidation facts, and documentary dates.
  • Check outstanding CT returns, final-return requirements, tax, penalties, and any refundable balance.
  • Verify the authority of the registered Authorized Signatory and the person making the declaration.

De-Registration Details

Use DD/MM/YYYY. Sample from screenshot: 10/07/2026.
The wording is clear, but evidence must show that the business genuinely ceased. “No further taxable supplies” is not enough by itself if the entity remains active and continues other business activities.
Sale of business branch: The FTA user manual shows additional fields for the date of sale/transfer and buyer/transferee details.

Field-by-field consultant analysis

Myanmar + English
Fieldမြန်မာရှင်းလင်းချက်English explanationEvidence / Control
Date of cessationအမှန်တကယ် business ရပ်တန့်သည့်နေ့၊ entity ceases to exist / dissolution / liquidation trigger တို့နှင့်ကိုက်ညီရပါမယ်။ Licence cancellation date ကိုအမြဲတမ်းအသုံးပြုရမယ်လို့ မယူဆပါနှင့်။Use the date supported by the actual cessation, entity ceasing to exist, dissolution, liquidation, or other relevant trigger. Do not automatically copy the licence-cancellation date.Licence cancellation/expiry, board/shareholder resolution, liquidation or closure document, last trading evidence.
ReasonPortal dropdown reason နဲ့ uploaded document reason တူရပါမယ်။ Sale ကို cessation လို့ရွေးခြင်းက buyer fields ပျောက်စေနိုင်ပါတယ်။The selected portal reason must match the legal documents. Selecting cessation for a sale can suppress buyer/transferee fields and create inconsistency.Sale agreement, merger certificate, re-domiciliation document, cessation evidence.
Detailed reasonGeneric sentence တစ်ကြောင်းတည်းမထားဘဲ ဘာကြောင့်၊ ဘယ်နေ့၊ ဘယ် document နဲ့ ရပ်တန့်သလဲ ချိတ်ဆက်ရေးပါ။Avoid a generic sentence only. Link the reason, date, business facts, and supporting document.Consistent chronology and document references.
Supporting documentsFTA က reason ကိုသက်သေပြနိုင်တဲ့ documentary evidence တောင်းထားပါတယ်။ Document များက entered date/reason ကို ထောက်ခံရပါမယ်။The FTA requires documentary evidence supporting the reason. Documents should directly support the entered date and reason.Readable, signed/stamped where applicable, correct company name and dates.
Financial documentsScreenshot မှာ optional ဖြစ်ပေမယ့် last accounts, trial balance, final tax computation, nil activity proof စတာတွေက FTA review မှာအသုံးဝင်နိုင်ပါတယ်။Shown as optional in the screenshot, but final accounts, trial balance, final tax computation, or evidence of nil activity may support the review.Reconcile to filed returns and outstanding balances.

Stop / Start / Increase

  • Stop: Licence expire ဖြစ်တာကို automatic cessation date လို့သတ်မှတ်ခြင်း။
  • Start: Date–reason–document chronology table တစ်ခုလုပ်ခြင်း။
  • Increase: CT return status, payable balance, penalties, credit/refund, bank and licence closure evidence cross-check လုပ်ခြင်း။

Stop / Start / Increase

  • Stop: treating licence expiry as the automatic cessation date.
  • Start: maintaining a date–reason–document chronology table.
  • Increase: cross-checks of CT return status, payable tax, penalties, credits/refunds, bank records, and licence closure evidence.
Readiness check / အဆင်သင့်ဖြစ်မှုစစ်ဆေးချက်
  • Click “Check readiness” to validate the current data.

Identity/authority mismatch check: The Authorized Signatory shown is WALEED AHMED, while the declaration details show ZIHUAI GAO. This is not automatically invalid, but authority to submit should be verified and tax records should be current before filing.

5. Post-Submission Control

What happens next
Simulation reference: Not submitted in this simulation.
1

Application submitted

Save the reference number and submission copy.

2

FTA review

The FTA may pre-approve, approve, reject, or request additional information.

3

Final return

EmaraTax may generate a final Corporate Tax Return or request outstanding returns.

4

Settle balance

Pay outstanding Corporate Tax and administrative penalties; address any credit balance/refund.

5

TRN deactivated

Deregistration is completed only after FTA approval and completion of obligations.

မြန်မာ — တင်ပြီးနောက် စောင့်ကြည့်ရန်

  • Application reference number ကို case file ထဲမှာသိမ်းပါ။
  • EmaraTax correspondence၊ email၊ SMS ကိုစောင့်ကြည့်ပါ။
  • FTA additional information တောင်းလျှင် deadline မကျော်မီ ပြန်တင်ပါ။
  • Final return / outstanding returns မတင်ပြီး၊ tax နှင့် penalty မရှင်းဘဲ TRN deactivated ဖြစ်မယ်လို့ မယူဆပါနှင့်။
  • FTA account မှာ credit ရှိလျှင် refund process သီးခြားတင်ရနိုင်ပါတယ်။

English — Post-submission monitoring

  • Retain the application reference number in the case file.
  • Monitor EmaraTax correspondence, email, and SMS.
  • Respond to requests for additional information before the stated deadline.
  • Do not assume that the TRN is deactivated before all outstanding and final returns, tax, and penalties are resolved.
  • A credit balance may require a separate refund process in EmaraTax.
Processing: The current FTA service card states 30 business days from receipt of a completed application. A further review period can apply after additional information is provided, and an application may be rejected if requested information is not resubmitted within the stated period.
